notes: Hellgate London has some issues with the keyboard mapping! i had to set the layout within the console with: "setxkbmap us" and after that, the black screen at the beginning was gone! unfortunely does the mouse not work properly ingame. its spinning and has a huge delay. found no fix so far
title: HELLGATE: London

notes: Blackscreen FIX: run "setxkbmap us" in the terminal! Switching from Wayland back to X11 fixed mouse-issues i had. Runs smooth except for the 1-FPS bug that appears randomly BUT thats a bug from the game and not related to proton! hope this helps!
title: HELLGATE: London

notes: Works perfectly out of the box. (I am already using a US Keyboard layout, so no tweaking required here.)
title: HELLGATE: London
